prestazioni: HR-414E 3.5L V6 twin-turbo (JNC-001 engine code) with custom billet aluminum block reinforced by Tomei ARP studs, forged internals including JE 9.0:1 compression pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from HKS, paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (84mm inducer) and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates for 850+ hp at 2.2 bar boost on E85 fuel

Pankl Racing Systems 6-speed sequential transaxle with carbon-fiber reinforced gears, Drexler limited-slip differential with 45% lockup under load, and a Sachs Racing twin-disc carbon clutch (240mm) for 1,200 Nm torque capacity

Custom Motec M190 ECU with Super GT-spec traction control, launch control, and anti-lag system, integrated with a Bosch Motorsport MS5.1 engine management suite, paired with a PWR radiator and dual Setrab oil coolers for thermal stability at 9,500 RPM redline
estetica: ARTA Racing full-carbon fiber bodywork with Super GT-spec front splitter, rear diffuser, and GT300-style rear wing (3.2m² surface area) featuring Gurney flaps and adjustable carbon fiber side skirts for 1,200 kg downforce at 250 km/h

BBS RG-R 18x12 front / 18x13 rear forged magnesium wheels with Yokohama Advan A052 300/680R18 (front) and 320/710R18 (rear) semi-slick tires, wrapped in custom ARTA Racing livery with 3M 1080 vinyl and PPF clear bra for track durability

OMP Superleggera carbon fiber racing seats with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, integrated with a custom roll cage by Torque Racing (FIA 8862-2009 certified) and a Sparco carbon fiber steering wheel with Motec C127 dash display
